channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: My Unlikely Friendship with Bill Rusher
item.description: We deprive ourselves of true connection when we are unwilling to bond with people across the political aisle.

item.title: There's No Shame in Getting Older
item.description: Denying old age means denying what a vital society truly requires.

item.title: Boulder's Climate Lawsuit Is a Tax on Every American
item.description: The Supreme Court should stop a Colorado effort to override federal energy policy.

item.title: A Tale of Two Shows in Philly for America's 250th
item.description: PAFA's exhibition excels, thanks partly to a stunning renovation, while PMA's lags.
